name: Limited-Time Promotion
description: Drive urgency for specials and deals
prompt_template: Write a social media post for a limited-time restaurant promotion. Offer type: {offer_type}. Discount/details: {discount_details}. Timeframe: {timeframe}. Target audience: {target_audience}. Restaurant name: {restaurant_name}. Use urgency language (limited time, today only), scarcity cues (while supplies last), a clear savings message, a strong CTA, and deal-focused emojis (e.g. 🚨, ⏰, 💥).

variables.name: offer_type
variables.description: Type of promotion (e.g. happy hour, BOGO)
